message:
fix(scan_pipeline): recover trigger matches split across chunk boundaries

Add a sliding overlap buffer to ChunkedPipelineState so trigger patterns
that span chunk boundaries are detected with full parity to batch mode.
The overlap window retains the last N bytes (where N = max pattern
length - 1) and prepends them when scanning the next chunk, excluding
matches that fall entirely in the overlap region to avoid double-counting.

Fix logical line counting for data without trailing newlines via the new
logical_lines() method. Replace the old chunked_may_miss_split_patterns
acceptance test (which asserted chunked_total <= batch_total) with a
strict parity assertion (chunked == batch). Add two new proptest
properties for arbitrary chunk boundary trigger and line count parity,
plus a unit test for trailing-newline-less data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -192,10 +192,10 @@ run_rch_expect_success \
   cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test proptest_scan_pipeline chunked_batch_trigger_parity -- --nocapture
 
 run_rch_expect_success \
-  "failure_injection_split_pattern" \
-  "failure_injection.chunk_split_trigger_loss_boundary" \
-  "cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib chunked_may_miss_split_patterns -- --nocapture" \
-  cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib chunked_may_miss_split_patterns -- --nocapture
+  "split_pattern_recovery" \
+  "recovery_path.chunk_split_trigger_overlap" \
+  "cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib chunked_recovers_split_patterns_with_overlap -- --nocapture" \
+  cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib chunked_recovers_split_patterns_with_overlap -- --nocapture
 
 run_rch_expect_success \
   "recovery_cross_boundary_ansi" \
